title: Norway crown prince's stepson sentenced to four years in prison over rape, domestic violence
summary_full: Marius Borg Hoiby, the son of Norway's Crown Prince, has been sentenced to four years in prison after being found guilty of two counts of rape and domestic violence. The trial unveiled distressing aspects of the case, stirring public discourse and casting a shadow over the royal family's reputation.
